{{CargoOrgan
|name=Multipolar Dendrite
|type=Common
|rank=green
|id=10806
|idx=6
|description=When the brain reaches the limits of cognition, it begins to grow multipolar dendrites to process the overload of information—this is the moment when true intelligence ascends…
|skill=
|hp=450
|def=76
|atk=35
|rush=51
|gene1=In explorations, {race} DEF +20
|gene2=In explorations, Dodge +5%
|gene7=Wind DMG +90 (Awakened)
|}}
